content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 creatorXchange: Community Manager Anywhere in the World 🇧🇷 Brazil, 🇨🇦 Canada, 🇨🇴 Colombia, 🇬🇧 United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland, 🇲🇽 Mexico, and 🇺🇸 United States of America Arkansas Community Growth, Customer Relationship Management, Admin, Client Retention, Moderation, Content Creation, Engagement Tactics, Relationship Building, Stakeholder Communication, and Slack Customer Support Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5765/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Bentonville, AR <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://creatorxchange.co/">https://creatorxchange.co/</a> </p> <p><strong>THE ROLE</strong></p> <p><em>Certification is not the product. A producing operator is.</em></p> <p>Anyone can sell a training program. The only number that matters is how many certified operators are closing real clients ninety days later. Every one who produces becomes the case study that brings in the next group. Every one who stalls is a person who trusted us and got nothing for it.</p> <p>You decide which.</p> <p>Not the curriculum. Not the sales page. What happens in the ninety days after somebody commits.</p> <p>You run GridLocked, our operator certification community. You build the first ninety days. You spot the operator going quiet in week one instead of month three. You answer every recurring question exactly once and then write it down so it never gets asked again. You capture the wins and turn them into proof.</p> <p>You are also landing a change mid-flight. Our first operators certify on the infrastructure we run today and get upgraded onto our own platform when it ships, right when they are trying to close their first client. Making that feel like the gift it is, rather than a disruption, is this role.</p> <p><strong>WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR</strong></p> <ul> <li>You have run a paid community where members were expected to produce results, not just show up.</li> <li>You can tell us what percentage of them hit the outcome, and how you know.</li> <li>You chase the quiet member, not the loud one.</li> <li>You write documentation instead of repeating yourself. Your support volume goes down every month, on purpose.</li> <li>You are comfortable telling an adult they are behind. You have done it, and they thanked you for it later.</li> <li>You hold the line on camera with American business owners who paid real money and will push back. Your spoken and written English is excellent.</li> <li>You have never once confused engagement with results.</li> </ul> <p><strong>WHAT YOU GET</strong></p> <ul> <li>Salary of $3,000 per month. Fully remote, work from anywhere.</li> <li>Ownership of the program that determines whether the entire operator model works.</li> <li>A community of business owners, not students. People with capital, ambition, and something to lose.</li> <li>A direct line to leadership on curriculum, positioning, and program design.</li> </ul> <p><strong>HOW TO APPLY</strong></p> <p>Apply at careers.creatorxchange.co.</p> <p>You will answer five questions on camera and attach a resume or a link to something you built. No cover letter. We will not read it.</p> <p>Strong candidates hear from us within seventy-two hours. This role starts after our first operator cohort launches, so we are hiring ahead of the start date.</p> <p>================================================================</p> <p><em>creatorXchange is an equal opportunity employer. We consider all qualified applicants regardless of race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or veteran status.</em></p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/creatorxchange-community-manager">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/creatorxchange-community-manager</a></p> Thu, 09 Jul 2026 13:56:21 +0000 Sat, 08 Aug 2026 13:56:21 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/creatorxchange-community-manager https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/creatorxchange-community-manager Vidalytics: AI Native Creative Strategist (Full Funnels Ownership from Ads to LTV) Anywhere in the World 🇺🇸 United States of America Delaware Sales and Marketing Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0123/5841/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Austin, TX <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://vidalytics.com">https://vidalytics.com</a> </p> <p>If you can create copy and marketing that converts, and you actually know WHY it converts, and you can take raw customer research, turn it into a big idea, and ship a finished asset that prints money on cold traffic, keep reading.</p> <p>Now do all of that with AI in your corner, so you can scale the highest converting video player for marketers and get paid for what you produce. You'll act like a Creative Director and Copy Chief to the LLMs.</p> <p>Then this is the job for you.</p> <p>You have to be a great marketer WITHOUT AI first. That means you know how to structure&nbsp; VSLs, ads, landing pages, and upsells with the right mechanics: hooks, big ideas, unique mechanisms, social proof, objection handling, and real emotional impact…&nbsp;</p> <p>… and you’re not just relying on AI to write something that sounds cool.&nbsp;</p> <p>You need to own the strategy behind your marketing. You can’t expect other people to do your thinking for you. With AI those days are gone. Thus you need to really get - what we make, why we make it, what we test next, and getting it produced.</p> <p>We're Vidalytics.com, a video hosting platform that increases the conversions for any marketing video.&nbsp;</p> <p>Videos hosted on Vidalytics have sold over $5.7 Billion. We aren't some brand awareness fluff factory. We're ROI or die.</p> <p>Clients include:</p> <p>VShred&nbsp; •&nbsp; Frank Kern&nbsp; •&nbsp; USCCA&nbsp; •&nbsp; Jon Benson&nbsp; •&nbsp; Primal Health&nbsp; •&nbsp; Brendon Burchard&nbsp; •&nbsp; Performance Golf&nbsp; •&nbsp; Todd Brown&nbsp; •&nbsp; Perry Belcher&nbsp; •&nbsp; Entrenation&nbsp; •&nbsp; Mike Dillard&nbsp; •&nbsp; Trugenics&nbsp; •&nbsp; Chris Haddad&nbsp; •&nbsp; and even bigger, better known brands under NDA<br><br></p> <h1>What You'll Be Doing (Job Tasks) </h1> <p>(You direct the machine, then own the decisions that move the needle)</p> <p>You'll be the architect of creative across the whole Vidalytics marketing engine: the strategy, the copy, and the production behind it. The key to this role is getting funnels to convert on cold traffic and cold email.<br><br></p> <p>Some of the things you may be working on, and can be discussed based on your experience, results and preferences.</p> <p><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li> <p>Creative s
